spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing for Marketing, Technical Dense Grid for Admin/Dashboard.
spacing_and_layout.admin_grid: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4, gap-4)
spacing_and_layout.container_borders: Containers with borders must use internal padding p-6 or p-8

surfaces_and_micro_themes.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 shadow-sm
surfaces_and_micro_themes.product_cards: Technical Grid Look: bg-card border border-white/10. Hover: -translate-y-1 border-primary/50 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(250,204,21,0.15)]
surfaces_and_micro_themes.admin_cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border, no shadow

motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up using framer-motion

icons.style: duotone or regular, depending on context. Use phosphor for a crisp technical feel.

components_strategy.buttons: Sharp corners or slight radius (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary buttons are Cyber Yellow with Black text.
components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized to match dark theme (darker inputs, white/10 borders).
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50. Always visible links on desktop.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Maintain APCA standards. Text over images must have shadow or dark overlays.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='checkout-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Load JetBrains Mono and Outfit via Google Fonts in index.css.
Configure Tailwind with the provided color variables using CSS custom properties in index.css.
Install libraries: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/engine @tsparticles/slim lenis

For the Hero Section, use the provided hero_background image with a heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/90 via-black/50 to-transparent) and initialize TSParticles for a futuristic floating data/grid effect.
The e-commerce layout should have a rigid, technical grid. Use border-white/10 extensively on cards. Hover effects should introduce Cyber Yellow borders and glow.
Use JetBrains Mono specifically for product prices, SKUs, and data tables to enhance the 'maker/developer' feel.
Admin Dashboard must be highly dense (Mode B), completely ditching generous spacing in favor of compact, high-contrast rows.
